title: card-skill editorial-image mode input
description: Structured input for aspect-aware editorial images for WeChat/blog covers, concept metaphors, and quiet in-article mood illustrations. Use article-diagram for explanatory body diagrams.

use.description: Editorial job, not a canvas ratio. Use cover for article covers, in-article for quiet body mood illustrations, and metaphor for concept/stance images. Defaults to cover behavior when omitted.

aspect.description: Canvas ratio. Defaults by use: cover -> blog-hero unless WeChat is requested, metaphor -> blog-hero, in-article -> body-3-2. Do not put aspect values into use.

design.description: Explicit design system name. Overrides editorial_tone. Controls mood tokens such as paper, ink, accent, surface, and radius; it does not decide the visual metaphor.

editorial_tone.description: Automatic editorial design selector used only when design is omitted. Maps the article mood to a real Quiet Paper design.

kicker.description: Small editorial label, e.g. ESSAY, NOTES, or the aspect label.

subtitle.description: Optional short supporting line. Keep it brief.

visual_metaphor.description: One-sentence visual metaphor or scene idea.

cover_motif.description: Deterministic right-side visual for use=cover. Choose the concrete article object: drawer for durable write-back, window for reportable access, lens for interpretation, path for a handoff or workflow, archive for retrieval, and layers for stacked system views. Omit only for the deliberately generic legacy paper-stack cover.

art_direction.description: Freeform art direction. Used as guidance and fallback visual caption.

text_plan.description: Text plan for the composition, preserved as a CSS comment for traceability.

composition_required.description: Required and true for use=in-article and use=metaphor. Set true for any cover direction that cannot be delivered by the title plus cover_motif scaffold. Final render input must then include both content_html and custom_css.

content_html.description: Trusted custom HTML composition. Use after the AI flow chooses a visual direction; preferred for final editorial images that need a concrete subject or scene.

custom_css.description: Trusted custom CSS composition layer. Use for visual expression beyond the default scaffold, including the dominant object, scene, gesture, or diagram metaphor. Visible text must use a controlled primary font: DM Sans, DM Serif Display, JetBrains Mono, XiangcuiDengcusong, or XiangcuiDazijiti; fallback fonts may follow the primary font. Custom CSS must stay inside the card-skill Quiet Paper system: token-derived paper surfaces, low-saturation accents, hairline borders, small radius, and little or no shadow.

source.description: Optional source line in the colophon.

logo.description: Optional path to a brand logo or avatar image. Omit for an unbranded output; do not use a photo alias.

brand_name.description: Optional brand or author name in the colophon footer. Omit for an unbranded output; do not use an author alias.

examples.title: 工具让人遗忘什么
examples.subtitle: 一篇关于自动化、记忆和写作边界的札记
examples.visual_metaphor: A writing desk with one labeled drawer missing.
